full_text:
Shi Wei 士䵋
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Wei (士䵋). Recommended to Han court, later exiled by Sun Quan and then executed. Shi Wei was affiliated with Shi Xie.
